title: 50 Pieces Ovulation Test Strips,Ovulation Predictor,Highly Sensitive 25miu/ml Test,Track Ovulations Tests,Fast and Accurate Results
features: Each box contains 50 individually wrapped test strips, eliminating frequent restocking while meeting both daily monitoring and backup needs for greater value.

With a sensitivity of 25 mIU/mL, it's ideal for ovulation timing. Ovulation testing gives women greater opportunity to predict their ovulation window, specifically designed for those seeking natural conception.

Within 3-5 minutes after urine contact, the test strip displays color. The clear contrast between the control line and test line provides intuitive assistance in identifying ovulation-related periods, enabling advance planning. Results are easy to interpret, even for beginners.

Convenient for daily home monitoring without disrupting your routine. During business trips or travel, the compact, individually packaged strips are easy to pack in luggage without taking up space. This allows continuous tracking even when away, ensuring you never miss a critical window.
Versatile:It is your most trusted and reliable companion during the pregnancy process. Once detected, it increases the chances of getting pregnant in the following time.
